modules_created.description: Package init for the Runtime integration layer.
Abstract base class defining the contract for runtime observers. Single abstract method handle_signal(signal). No runtime logic implemented; stdlib only (abc).
Wraps a RGERuntimeInterface and exposes on_signal(signal) which delegates to runtime_interface.handle_signal(signal). Adapts the interface contract to a callable-style subscriber.
Maintains list of RGERuntimeSubscriber instances. register_runtime(interface) wraps the interface and appends it. dispatch(signal) delivers synchronously to all subscribers in registration order.
Centralized access point holding a single RGERuntimeDispatcher. register_runtime(interface) delegates to dispatcher. get_dispatcher() returns the held dispatcher instance.

changes: Added optional runtime_dispatcher: Optional[RGERuntimeDispatcher] = None constructor parameter.
Added set_runtime_dispatcher(dispatcher) method for post-construction attachment.
emit() now forwards to runtime_dispatcher.dispatch(signal) after delivering to normal subscribers, if dispatcher is not None.
Dispatcher import guarded under TYPE_CHECKING to avoid circular dependency at runtime.
Added optional runtime_dispatcher: Optional[RGERuntimeDispatcher] = None constructor parameter.
propagate_packet() calls runtime_dispatcher.dispatch(signal) after broadcaster.broadcast(signal) if both broadcaster and runtime_dispatcher are configured.

subscriber_test.description: RGERuntimeDispatcher.register_runtime() wraps interface in RGERuntimeSubscriber. dispatch() delivers signal to on_signal() which calls handle_signal(). Single and multi-subscriber delivery confirmed.

dispatcher_test.description: Two independent runtimes registered to one dispatcher each receive the same signal. Order preserved; both received[0] is the dispatched signal.

signal_dispatch_test.description: RGECognitionChannel.emit() delivers to normal callable subscribers and then to runtime dispatcher. set_runtime_dispatcher() post-construction attachment also confirmed.

registry_test.description: RGERuntimeRegistry.register_runtime() delegates to internal dispatcher. get_dispatcher() returns the same instance which correctly dispatches registered interfaces.

engine_runtime_test.description: RGERecursionFieldEngine.propagate_packet() with broadcaster and runtime_dispatcher configured: packet moved A→B, signal emitted through broadcaster, runtime dispatcher received signal with correct packet_id/source/destination/timestamp. Engine without runtime_dispatcher propagates successfully with no error.
